title: aeschynanthus loheri
intro: Aeschynanthus loheri, also known as the "Mist Maiden" or "Loher's Aeschynanthus", is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Gesneriaceae family. It is native to the Philippines and is prized for its vibrant, trumpet-shaped flowers and its medicinal properties. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. Aeschynanthus loheri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall health and well-being.
